Scout Troop 1018
Merit BadgesProcedureAI Badge

Group Counseling for AI Merit Badge

We are pleased to offer group counseling sessions for the AI Merit Badge. The sessions are scheduled as follows:

  • Monday, April 27, 6:30–7:20 PM
  • Monday, May 4, 6:30–7:20 PM

All sessions will be held at the church.

The AI Merit Badge requires completion of two projects. After attending the group sessions, each Scout is expected to complete the projects independently and then schedule an individual meeting with the counselor to demonstrate completion of all requirements.

Sign-up: Interested Scouts should sign up by Wednesday, April 22 using the following link:

  https://forms.gle/ECpLUGP1HnbDUvqm9

Additional details will be posted on this page at a later time.
